z6ObjectMappingTest.testTreeMounting.<locals>.Root.helloN)

assertRaises

apps
	TypeError)
testTreeMounting
z"ObjectMappingTest.testTreeMountingc
skipped (Python 3 only)z
class Root(object):
    @cherrypy.expose
    def hello(self, *, name='world'):
        return 'Hello %s!' % name
cherrypy.tree.mount(Application(Root(), '/keywords'))z
/keywords/hellorv
/keywords/hello/extraro
version_info
skip
execrf
